links.note: The logo is the brand identity for the Bennie Connect cooperative farming portal platform.
Logo uses a dark/gradient green background with white wordmark and muted green tagline text.
Logo features a stylized sprout/seedling leaf icon in a rounded square badge on the left.
Logo includes the tagline text 'COOPERATIVE PORTAL' beneath the wordmark.
Logo displays the wordmark text 'Bennie Connect'.
A sprouting seedling icon conventionally represents growth, agriculture, and farming.
'COOPERATIVE PORTAL' tagline identifies the platform as a cooperative member portal for farmers.
Green color palette reinforces the agricultural / nature brand identity.
